home.heroTagline: Challenge a friend! Each player instructs their AI and places bets — then watch them battle live.
home.dashboardHint: Use My Dashboard to review your own matches and see whether each one was won, lost, drawn, or still in progress.
home.createMatchDesc: Start a new game as Player 1. You'll get a link to share with your opponent.
home.vsAiDesc: Challenge an AI opponent solo — no need to wait for a human player. Your AI faces off against an AI opponent right away.
home.joinMatchDesc: Have a match code or link? Enter it below to join as Player 2.
home.errorNotFound: Match not found. Check the code and try again.
home.errorTryAgain: Could not find that match. Try again.
home.stepCreateDesc: Player 1 creates a match and gets a shareable link
home.stepShareDesc: Send the link to your opponent (Player 2)
home.stepSetupDesc: Each player configures their AI and places bets privately
home.stepPlayDesc: Watch the AIs battle live — best bet wins!

login.upgradeGuestTagline: Upgrade guest session for {{username}} and keep your matches
login.upgradeGuestNote: This will attach email and password to your current guest session, so your existing matches stay on the same account.
login.usernameHint: Letters, numbers, _ and - only. Min 3 characters.
login.firstUserAdmin: The first registered user becomes admin.
login.guestLoginWarn: To keep your guest match history, upgrade this guest session with Register. If you need another account, sign out first.
login.errorUsernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
login.errorUsernameChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
login.errorPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login.errorSomethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review your recent matches, see whether you won or lost, and jump back into games that are still running.
dashboard.recentMatchesHint: Newest matches first. Ongoing games stay marked until they finish.
dashboard.noMatches: You have not played any matches yet.

admin.pageDescription: Manage settings, users, and match statistics.
admin.apiKeyHint: Shared API key used for all game matches.
admin.availableModelsHint: One model ID per line. Leave empty to allow all models from OpenRouter.
admin.forceSameModel: Force same model for all players
admin.forcedModelHint: Players will not see model selection in match setup, and this model will be used for both sides.
admin.forceSameModelError: Select a forced model or add at least one available model before enabling forced mode.
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Permanently delete user "{{username}}" and ALL their matches? This cannot be undone.
admin.useOpenRouterFreeHint: Routes all LLM calls through the openrouter/free model (https://openrouter.ai/openrouter/free). Player model selection is ignored while this is on.

game.title: Connect 4
game.setupDesc: Configure two AIs and watch them battle it out on the Connect 4 board! Each player instructs their AI on how to play, then let the game begin.
game.instructionsPlaceholder: Tell the AI how to play as Player {{player}}… e.g. "Play aggressively, always look for immediate winning moves first, then block the opponent."
game.betColumnDesc: Pick which column the final winning piece will land in.
game.betMovesDesc: Guess how many total moves the game will take ({{min}}–{{max}}). Closest guess wins!
game.placeBetsWarn: ⚠ Both players must place a column bet and a move-count bet to start
game.matchScoreFormula: Win +1,000 pts · Column off ×10 · Move off ×1

match.joinDesc: Sign in with your account, or enter a username to join this match as a guest.
match.waitingForP2Desc: Share this match with your opponent. Once they join, you'll both configure your AIs!
match.player1Reserved2: This seat is reserved for Player 1.
match.guestJoined: Joined as guest {{username}}. You can finish this match without creating an account.
match.configureAIDesc: Your setup is private — your opponent can't see your instructions.
match.instructionsPlaceholder: Tell your AI how to play… e.g. "Play aggressively, always look for immediate winning moves first."
match.instructionsHint: 🔒 Your opponent cannot see these instructions
match.placeBetsWarn: ⚠ Place a column bet and a move-count bet to continue
